label: Heavy going
summary:
The war defines the day. Trump says he is in 'no hurry' to close a deal with Iran, deflating hopes that the tentative ceasefire framework would firm up this weekend. Israel expands its ground operation in Lebanon while European leaders condemn the advance, and the US strikes a fourth alleged drug boat in the Pacific this week, bringing the campaign's death toll to 205.

Europe's economy is buckling under the weight of the conflict: the eurozone composite PMI fell to a 31-month low of 47.5, France is in its deepest contraction since COVID lockdowns, and inflation is accelerating for the seventh straight month. US PCE inflation rose to 3.8%, the highest since May 2023, even as equities hit records — the Dow closed above 51,000 for the first time.

But there is genuine light. An experimental pancreatic cancer drug nearly doubled survival time in a 500-patient trial, a major breakthrough after decades of failed attempts at the target. East Asia is baking under unprecedented heat records, yet the clean-energy transition keeps accelerating — solar overtook coal globally for the first time in 2025, and China's solar capacity is set to pass coal this year. The mood is strained: the war is grinding, the economy is cracking, but science and energy keep delivering.

drivers.headline: Trump says he's in 'no hurry' to make a deal as US-Iran war drags into fourth month without agreement
Israel expands Lebanon ground operation; European leaders condemn advance as 'scorched earth' policy
US strike on alleged drug boat kills 3 in Pacific, fourth attack this week — campaign death toll reaches 205
Eurozone PMI falls to 31-month low of 47.5 as Iran war drives deepening economic contraction across Europe
US PCE inflation rises to 3.8% annually, highest since May 2023, as energy costs persist
Dow closes above 51,000 for the first time; S&P 500 seals ninth consecutive weekly gain
Unprecedented heat wave smashes over 100 temperature records across Japan and China in May
Experimental pancreatic cancer pill nearly doubles survival time in 500-patient trial — first drug to hit long-elusive target
Solar overtook coal globally for first time in 2025; China's solar capacity on track to surpass coal in 2026
Researchers develop brine-free solar desalination system that turns seawater to drinking water using laser-etched metal
Afghan refugees' lorry overturns on highway in eastern Afghanistan, killing at least 22
